product_overview: InBill ERP is a local-first desktop ERP for billing, inventory, party ledger management, expenses, reporting, and cloud synchronization. It helps businesses manage daily sales and records from a single interface with optional Neon Cloud sync for backup and multi-device access.
core_goals: Create and print sales invoices with tax calculation and stock updates
Manage product inventory, pricing, and stock levels
Track customer and supplier balances through party-ledger transactions
Record and review daily business expenses
Configure application settings and synchronize data to the cloud

features.name: Billing & Invoicing
features.description: Create sales invoices, calculate GST, and update stock when a sale is recorded.
user_flows: Navigate to /billing -> Select a customer or choose walk-in -> Add products to the cart -> Set the payment mode -> Generate and print the invoice
Navigate to /billing -> Select a customer or choose walk-in -> Add products to the cart -> Change the payment mode to credit -> Generate the invoice and update the customer's ledger

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Add new products, update stock, and search inventory by product details.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Add a new product with its details -> Save the product -> See the product added to inventory
Navigate to /products -> Search for a product by name or barcode -> Find the matching product -> Update the stock quantity -> See the revised inventory level

features.name: Party Ledger
features.description: Create parties, record payments or collections, and review transaction history for customers and suppliers.
user_flows: Navigate to /parties -> Create a new party -> Save the party record -> See the party in the ledger list
Navigate to /parties -> Select an existing party -> Record a payment or collection -> Save the transaction -> See the updated balance and transaction history

features.name: Daily Expense Tracking
features.description: Record day-to-day expenses and review expense entries for business bookkeeping.
user_flows: Navigate to /expenses -> Enter expense details -> Save the expense -> See the expense listed in daily records

features.name: Business Reports and Analytics
features.description: Review business performance summaries and analytics from reports.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Review business report summaries -> Inspect sales, expense, or ledger analytics -> See performance insights

features.name: Application Settings and Cloud Synchronization
features.description: Configure app settings, enter Neon cloud connection details, and sync local data to the cloud.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Paste the Neon connection URL -> Start cloud sync -> See synchronization complete
Navigate to /settings -> Toggle background sync on -> Leave the settings screen -> Continue with automatic cloud synchronization enabled

features.name: Billing & Invoicing
features.description: Create sales invoices, calculate GST, and update stock

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Add, edit, and track product stock and pricing
user_interactions: Search products by name or barcode

features.name: Party Ledger
features.description: Track customer and supplier balances and payments

features.name: Cloud Synchronization
features.description: Mirror local data to Neon Cloud database

known_limitations.issue: Print preview requires Electron main process, not testable in browser
known_limitations.impact: PDF generation cannot be verified in headful browser tests
